channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Video Shows Fire Engine Weaving Through Traffic Before Rollover
item.description: New video shows an LAPD fire engine weaving through traffic, swerving to avoid an SUV, and crashing into a building. Two firefighters were injured.

item.title: Trump allies and Jan. 6 defendants line up for $1.7 billion fund
item.description: Jan. 6 defendants and Trump allies are applying for a share of the DOJ's $1.776 billion Anti-Weaponization Fund.

item.title: California primary fight highlights Democratic Party's future divisions
item.description: A competitive California House primary reveals tensions between progressives and party leaders over the Democratic Party's direction.

item.title: Feeding Our Future fraud ringleader Aimee Bock sentenced to over 41 years
item.description: Aimee Bock, convicted ringleader of the $250 million Feeding Our Future fraud scheme, received a sentence of more than 40 years in prison.
